name: Standard User Story
description: Default template for generating user stories with acceptance criteria

defaultSections.heading: Description
defaultSections.placeholder: As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit].

defaultSections.heading: Acceptance Criteria
defaultSections.placeholder:
- Given [context], when [action], then [outcome].
- Given [context], when [action], then [outcome].

defaultSections.heading: Technical Notes
defaultSections.placeholder: Implementation details, constraints, and technical considerations.

defaultSections.heading: Out of Scope
defaultSections.placeholder: What is explicitly NOT included in this story.
